title: Better Structures +
description: Revamp your Minecraft world! Better Structures + adds diverse, handcrafted buildings that enhance exploration and bring life to the landscape.
body:
Better Structures + transforms your Minecraft world by adding a wide variety of detailed, handcrafted structures! From abandoned towers to hidden temples and immersive villages, this mod makes exploration more exciting than ever.

Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or just someone looking for more life in the world—this mod delivers:

🏰 Discover abandoned castles, watchtowers, shrines, and more

🌿 Naturally generated structures that blend with terrain

🔎 Exploration-focused gameplay with hidden secrets

🧱 Built using vanilla-friendly blocks and themes

🤝 Compatible with both Forge and NeoForge loaders

All structures are carefully designed to feel like they belong in the world—no more flat, repetitive terrain. Add depth, lore, and mystery to your adventures with Better Structures +!
